tasks.setup: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && chmod +x .githooks/pre-commit .githooks/pre-push && deno task e2e:install
tasks.check: deno fmt --check . && deno lint . && deno check
tasks.test: deno test -A --permit-no-files client server shared scripts main_test.ts
tasks.e2e:install: deno run -A npm:playwright install chromium && deno task build
tasks.e2e: deno task build && deno test -A e2e
tasks.pre-commit: deno task check && deno task test
tasks.pre-push: deno task check && deno task test && deno task e2e
